_comment: Canonical MEASURED results for OrbitSight (frozen evaluate.py + benchmark_latency.py). Single source of truth: scripts/make_figures.py reads this file. REAL-TIME deployable config (single model per sensor, all <40ms CPU) scores 0.668; OFFLINE max adds cross-grid ensembling + TTA for 0.689. Stars3 is routed to a grid-256 model (multi-object separation); Thuraya3 is a characterized limit (8 levers tried, none beat 0.469).

real_time.config: per-sensor single model: g192_ctx everywhere + Stars3 -> g256_ctx (grid-256). All sensors <40ms CPU (g256 DVX ~24ms, EVK4 38ms).
real_time.note: meets criterion #3 (<40ms CPU on every sensor)

offline.config: router: EVK4 -> cross-grid ensemble+TTA; DAVIS/DVX -> temporal+TTA; Stars3 -> g256_ctx
offline.note: max accuracy; EVK4 5-model ensemble+TTA ~211ms -> NOT real-time

best_config: REAL-TIME deployed: 0.668 (single model/sensor, Stars3->g256). OFFLINE max: 0.689 (router+ensemble+TTA).

dvx_stars3_gain.note: finer heatmap separates multi-object star field; recall 0.72->0.81

thuraya3_ablation.note: 8 levers, none beat baseline -> signal/domain limit, not tuning

latency_note: Deployed real-time config: single model per sensor (g192_ctx + Stars3->g256_ctx), CPU streaming (batch=1) -> 15-38 ms/window, all sensors under 40ms. Offline variant (0.689, cross-grid+TTA) is ~211ms -> not real-time.
